name: All-Apple Salad with Florida Dressing
recipeIngredient: 4 Juice of citruses (Valencia orange, navel, tangerine, tangelo)
6 Different kinds of apples (e.g., Red and Golden Delicious, Granny Smith, Rome Beauty, MacIntosh, Winesap)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apples.
2. Dice the apples.
3. Mix yogurt and juices in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the diced apples.
5. Chill until ready to serve.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 120.8 calories; 0.9 grams total fat (0.5 grams saturated fat); 1.3 grams protein; 23.5 grams carbohydrates; 1.4 milligrams cholesterol; 12.9 milligrams sodium.
